# MCP docs snapshot: `projects-tutorial`

## Query

## Assistant text

Oops! Your query returned no relevant docs. Can you provide more information?

The search results don't contain specific information about a "projects tutorial" or "projects-tutorial" in the WIN (Wiz Integration Network) documentation. While the documentation mentions that Wiz provides API access through WIN for third-party developers and includes various use cases like "Create Projects from file," the detailed tutorial you're looking for isn't available in these search results. To access the complete WIN API documentation including tutorials, you can navigate to the [Developer Documentation](https://app.wiz.io) by clicking **Profile** > **Developer** > **Developer Documentation** from within Wiz. The WIN API docs provide restricted access to Wiz data and functionality, along with demo environments and test data for each API. For third-party developers, they need to [apply for access](https://www.wiz.io/integrations/apply) to the WIN documentation first.
